notes: v1.6.0: Notebook Publishing — publish any notebook to a private, read-only web page at read.nomima.io (share a link + view-code). Pixel-faithful to the editor, offline-first, with opt-in file downloads and view analytics (coarse location & returning visitors, no raw IPs). Plus a refined minimap rail (Dock-style magnify, overdue-only date markers) and reliability fixes.
